cold_open: a spark of quiet awe and mystery, history opening up, intrigued and wondrous
setup: building gentle astonishment, discovery after discovery stacking up, bright curiosity
escalate_the_awe: lightly amazed and modern, the past humming inside the present, energetic wonder
the_turn: a curious questioning shift, the story tilting, gently skeptical and thoughtful
reveal_1: expansive and contemplative, a vast mountain scale opening, patient and awed
reveal_2: warm realization, many small voices joining together, quietly building
the_deeper_question: introspective and curious, weighing pieces of a puzzle, soft intrigue
human_layer: warm and reassuring, hidden brilliance glowing in a crowd, hopeful
payoff: uplifting and expansive, a gentle swell of collective hope, inspiring
button: profound and warm, a quiet hopeful close under a starry sky, gently soaring
